text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You didn't run away, I see.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm relieved, actually. I only wanted to confirm
that you hadn't become a complete coward. I'll be
on my way then...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for being straight with me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You never mince words and always say what
you're feeling, so I feel I can do the same.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It helped to clear my head, then this amaaazing
strategy suddenly came to mind. ☆

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So, thanks for that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Your lovable, huggable strategist Sei is back and
better than ever. ♪ Isn't that great? ☆

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
L-lovable?! Since when have I ever said such
things?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Said it? To me it sounded more like you screamed
it at the top of your lungs.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm totally pumped right now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And I'm looking forward to running against you,
ya first-rate fiend. Good luck, o rival of mine!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I know you'll put me on edge in the final stretch. I
won't let it faze me though.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. Don't get so carried away.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei! I'm super excited for today!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That so? I can't really say the same.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! That's how I felt until yesterday at
least.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But now, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat ya.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy... I've never heard you make a
declaration like that before!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I won't let you run ahead! There's no way
you're getting past me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heheh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You know what that means! Now I definitely have
to blow right past ya. ♪
